Hi Fernanda. Quick check: what are you working on right now?
Hi Daniel. I am currently reviewing the new contract.
Good. And the prices from the supplier?
We are still waiting for them. I am following up on two emails.
Are you attending the call at three?
No, I am not. I am coordinating with the export team instead.
Perfect. Are you updating the spreadsheet today?
Yes, I am. I will send you the full report tomorrow.

Hi Fernanda, this is a quick voice note from Daniel. I am calling about the weekly update. Right now, the logistics team is reviewing the shipment documents. I am still waiting for the prices from the supplier. We are not closing the contract today. I am attending a meeting at three. Please send me your status when you can. Thank you, and talk soon.

Hi, this is Fernanda with my status update. Right now, I am reviewing the new contract. I am coordinating with the export team in Vietnam. We are still waiting for confirmation from the supplier. I am updating the spreadsheet today, and I am following up on two emails. I am not attending the afternoon call. I will send the full report tomorrow. Thank you.
